criteria.priority_notes: Standard RIA evaluation criterion. No call-specific numerical weight is stated in the topic call extract. Call topic emphasises: (1) significant advances in AI agent autonomy, robustness, and reliability; (2) innovative multi-agent frameworks and protocols; (3) mandatory incorporation of qualitative and quantitative KPIs, benchmarking, and progress monitoring mechanisms.
criteria.assumption_note: Standard Horizon Europe RIA evaluation criterion. Explicit numerical weight is not stated in the topic call extract. Criterion name is derived from standard RIA evaluation form structure. Typical weight of 50% for RIA is known from General Annexes but is not confirmed from the Tier 2B source documents available and therefore not asserted here.

criteria.priority_notes: Standard RIA evaluation criterion. Call-specific impact priorities include: contribution to the Apply AI Strategy; deployment via European Digital Innovation Hubs (EDIHs); mandatory cohesion with ADRA; portfolio coverage across healthcare, advanced manufacturing, and in-vehicle autonomous driving sectors. Portfolio award procedure explicitly adjusts ranking to ensure at least one project per sector passes all thresholds.
criteria.assumption_note: Standard Horizon Europe RIA evaluation criterion. Explicit numerical weight not stated in topic call extract. The portfolio coverage requirement in procedure_exceptions reflects a specific programme-level impact priority that modifies the standard ranking order and is the only explicitly stated evaluation-layer priority in the available source documents.

criteria.priority_notes: Standard RIA evaluation criterion. Call-specific implementation requirements include: mandatory allocation of tasks for cohesion activities with ADRA and the GenAI4EU central Hub; linkage to AI Factories and Data Labs; development of synergies with international, European, national, or regional initiatives; reuse of public results from previous funded actions where possible.
criteria.assumption_note: Standard Horizon Europe RIA evaluation criterion. Explicit numerical weight not stated in topic call extract. Criterion name is derived from standard RIA evaluation form structure. Typical weight of 20% for RIA is known from General Annexes but is not confirmed from the Tier 2B source documents available and therefore not asserted here.
